title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
